message:
fix(security): shadow trimmed value in input validation to prevent bypass

Fix trim-then-check pattern in sanitize_path_segment and
validate_sql_identifier across 4 connectors. Previously the code
called value.trim().is_empty() for the emptiness check but then used
the original untrimmed value for subsequent path-traversal and SQL
injection checks — whitespace-padded payloads could bypass validation.

Now shadows the parameter with let value = value.trim() so all
downstream checks (contains(".."), contains("../"), etc.) operate
on the trimmed value.

Affected: kubernetes, mysql, qq, snowflake client.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
